hero_title: I build clear, fast, and professional web interfaces.
hero_subtitle: I am Laurence Talé KUZORD. I turn business needs into useful, responsive, and maintainable web pages.
quick_item_training: DWWM training (Web and Mobile Web Developer)
quick_item_base: Strong HTML, CSS, and JavaScript foundations
about_text_1: I design user-centered web experiences, with a strong focus on code readability, performance, and accessibility.
about_text_2: My goal: join a team in a work-study position to contribute to real projects, learn quickly, and deliver reliable interfaces.
skills_front_text: Semantic HTML5, modern CSS3 (flex/grid), vanilla JavaScript.
skills_quality_text: Responsive design, baseline accessibility, clean code structure.
skills_soft_text: Rigor, autonomy, clear communication, and solution-oriented mindset.
project_1_text: Designed a financial data consultation interface with a modular front-end architecture to simplify maintenance and future evolution. Implemented a clear information layout (cards, tables, filters) to improve readability and user decision-making.
project_2_text: Built my responsive showcase website to present my profile, skills, and projects in a structured way. Added light/dark theme support, scroll reveal animations, and a section layout focused on content readability.
project_3_text: Project focused on designing and implementing a native SQL database. Created the relational schema and fully implemented CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete) to ensure reliable data management. Developed add, edit, and delete features for items, users, and tags, with consistent business logic and durable data structure.
project_4_text: Created a responsive, dynamic landing page with a countdown timer. Built during my training, this project was my first complete landing page, clear and adapted to all screen sizes.
service_1_text: Turning mockups into clean and responsive HTML/CSS pages.
service_2_text: Reworking existing interfaces to make navigation and content clearer.
service_3_text: Fixes, visual optimization, and reliability improvements for existing pages.
exp_1_title: Web and Mobile Web Developer Training
exp_1_text: Deepening web integration, JavaScript, and project best practices.
exp_2_text: Building concrete projects to improve front-end delivery quality.
contact_availability_value: Work-study as Application Developer Designer (CDA) / Full-stack projects
